InvoiceUnits.description: An invoice unit is a set of mutually exclusive accounts that correspond to your business entity.

NextToken.description: The next token used to indicate where the returned list should start from.

InvoiceUnitArn.description: ARN to identify an invoice unit. This information can't be modified or deleted.

InvoiceReceiver.description: The account that receives invoices related to the invoice unit.

Name.description: A unique name that is distinctive within your Amazon Web Services.

Description.description: The assigned description for an invoice unit. This information can't be modified or deleted.

TaxInheritanceDisabled.description: Whether the invoice unit based tax inheritance is/ should be enabled or disabled.

Rule.description: An InvoiceUnitRule object used the categorize invoice units.

LinkedAccounts.description: The list of LINKED_ACCOUNT IDs where charges are included within the invoice unit.

BillSourceAccounts.description: A list of Amazon Web Services account account IDs that have delegated their billing responsibility to the receiver account through transfer billing. Unlike linked accounts, these bill source accounts can be payer accounts from other organizations that have authorized billing transfer to this account.

LastModified.description: The last time the invoice unit was updated. This is important to determine the version of invoice unit configuration used to create the invoices. Any invoice created after this modified time will use this invoice unit configuration.

ProcurementPortalPreferences.description: The list of procurement portal preferences associated with the Amazon Web Services account.

NextToken.description: The token to use to retrieve the next set of results, or null if there are no more results.

AwsAccountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID associated with this procurement portal preference summary.

ProcurementPortalPreferenceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the procurement portal preference.

BuyerDomain.description: The domain identifier for the buyer in the procurement portal.

BuyerIdentifier.description: The unique identifier for the buyer in the procurement portal.

SupplierDomain.description: The domain identifier for the supplier in the procurement portal.

SupplierIdentifier.description: The unique identifier for the supplier in the procurement portal.

Selector.description: Specifies criteria for selecting which invoices should be processed using a particular procurement portal preference.

InvoiceUnitArns.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of invoice unit identifiers to which this preference applies.

SellerOfRecords.description: The list of seller of record IDs to which this preference applies.

EinvoiceDeliveryEnabled.description: Indicates whether e-invoice delivery is enabled for this procurement portal preference.

PurchaseOrderRetrievalEnabled.description: Indicates whether purchase order retrieval is enabled for this procurement portal preference.

EinvoiceDeliveryPreferenceStatus.description: The current status of the e-invoice delivery preference in this summary.

EinvoiceDeliveryPreferenceStatusReason.description: The reason for the current e-invoice delivery preference status in this summary.

PurchaseOrderRetrievalPreferenceStatus.description: The current status of the purchase order retrieval preference in this summary.

PurchaseOrderRetrievalPreferenceStatusRe.description: The reason for the current purchase order retrieval preference status in this summary.

Version.description: The version number of the procurement portal preference configuration in this summary.

CreateDate.description: The date and time when the procurement portal preference was created.

LastUpdateDate.description: The date and time when the procurement portal preference was last updated.

Profiles.description: A list of invoice profiles corresponding to the requested accounts.

AccountId.description: The account ID the invoice profile is generated for.

ReceiverName.description: The name of the person receiving the invoice profile.

ReceiverAddress.description: The address of the receiver that will be printed on the invoice.

AddressLine1.description: The first line of the address.

AddressLine2.description: The second line of the address, if applicable.

AddressLine3.description: The third line of the address, if applicable.

DistrictOrCounty.description: The district or country the address is located in.

City.description: The city that the address is in.

StateOrRegion.description: The state, region, or province the address is located.

CountryCode.description: The country code for the country the address is in.

PostalCode.description: The postal code associated with the address.

ReceiverEmail.description: The email address for the invoice profile receiver.

Issuer.description: This specifies the issuing entity of the invoice.

InvoiceUnitArn.description: The ARN to identify an invoice unit. This information can't be modified or deleted.

ProcurementPortalPreferenceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the created procurement portal preference.

InvoiceUnitArn.description: The ARN to identify an invoice unit. This information can't be modified or deleted.

ProcurementPortalPreferenceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the deleted procurement portal preference.

InvoicePDF.description: The invoice document and supplemental documents associated with the invoice.

DocumentUrl.description: The pre-signed URL to download the invoice document.

DocumentUrlExpirationDate.description: The pre-signed URL expiration date of the invoice document.

SupplementalDocuments.description: List of supplemental documents associated with the invoice.

InvoiceUnitArn.description: The ARN to identify an invoice unit. This information can't be modified or deleted.

InvoiceReceiver.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID chosen to be the receiver of an invoice unit. All invoices generated for that invoice unit will be sent to this account ID.

Name.description: The unique name of the invoice unit that is shown on the generated invoice.

Description.description: The assigned description for an invoice unit.

TaxInheritanceDisabled.description: Whether the invoice unit based tax inheritance is/ should be enabled or disabled.

Rule.description: This is used to categorize the invoice unit. Values are Amazon Web Services account IDs. Currently, the only supported rule is LINKED_ACCOUNT.

LastModified.description: The most recent date the invoice unit response was updated.

LinkedAccounts.description: The list of LINKED_ACCOUNT IDs where charges are included within the invoice unit.

BillSourceAccounts.description: A list of Amazon Web Services account account IDs that have delegated their billing responsibility to the receiver account through transfer billing. Unlike linked accounts, these bill source accounts can be payer accounts from other organizations that have authorized billing transfer to this account.

ProcurementPortalPreference.description: The detailed configuration of the requested procurement portal preference.

AwsAccountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID associated with this procurement portal preference.

ProcurementPortalPreferenceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the procurement portal preference.

BuyerDomain.description: The domain identifier for the buyer in the procurement portal.

BuyerIdentifier.description: The unique identifier for the buyer in the procurement portal.

SupplierDomain.description: The domain identifier for the supplier in the procurement portal.

SupplierIdentifier.description: The unique identifier for the supplier in the procurement portal.

Selector.description: Specifies criteria for selecting which invoices should be processed using a particular procurement portal preference.

InvoiceUnitArns.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of invoice unit identifiers to which this preference applies.

SellerOfRecords.description: The list of seller of record IDs to which this preference applies.

ProcurementPortalSharedSecret.description: The shared secret or authentication credential used for secure communication with the procurement portal.

ProcurementPortalInstanceEndpoint.description: The endpoint URL where e-invoices are delivered to the procurement portal.

PurchaseOrderRetrievalEndpoint.description: The endpoint URL used for retrieving purchase orders from the procurement portal.

TestEnvPreference.description: Configuration on settings for the test environment of the procurement portal.

BuyerDomain.description: The domain identifier for the buyer in the test environment of the procurement portal.

BuyerIdentifier.description: The unique identifier for the buyer in the test environment of the procurement portal.

SupplierDomain.description: The domain identifier for the supplier in the test environment of the procurement portal.

SupplierIdentifier.description: The unique identifier for the supplier in the test environment of the procurement portal.

ProcurementPortalSharedSecret.description: The shared secret or authentication credential used for secure communication with the test environment.

ProcurementPortalInstanceEndpoint.description: The endpoint URL where e-invoices are delivered in the test environment.

PurchaseOrderRetrievalEndpoint.description: The endpoint URL used for retrieving purchase orders in the test environment.

EinvoiceDeliveryEnabled.description: Indicates whether e-invoice delivery is enabled for this procurement portal preference.

EinvoiceDeliveryPreference.description: The configuration settings that specify how e-invoices are delivered to the procurement portal.

EinvoiceDeliveryDocumentTypes.description: The types of e-invoice documents to be delivered.

EinvoiceDeliveryAttachmentTypes.description: The types of attachments to include with the e-invoice delivery.

Protocol.description: The communication protocol to use for e-invoice delivery.

PurchaseOrderDataSources.description: The sources of purchase order data to use for e-invoice generation and delivery.

ConnectionTestingMethod.description: The method to use for testing the connection to the procurement portal.

EinvoiceDeliveryActivationDate.description: The date when e-invoice delivery should be activated for this preference.

PurchaseOrderRetrievalEnabled.description: Indicates whether purchase order retrieval is enabled for this procurement portal preference.

Contacts.description: List of contact information for portal administrators and technical contacts.

EinvoiceDeliveryPreferenceStatus.description: The current status of the e-invoice delivery preference.

EinvoiceDeliveryPreferenceStatusReason.description: The reason for the current e-invoice delivery preference status.

PurchaseOrderRetrievalPreferenceStatus.description: The current status of the purchase order retrieval preference.

PurchaseOrderRetrievalPreferenceStatusRe.description: The reason for the current purchase order retrieval preference status.

Version.description: The version number of the procurement portal preference configuration.

CreateDate.description: The date and time when the procurement portal preference was created.

LastUpdateDate.description: The date and time when the procurement portal preference was last updated.

InvoiceSummaries.description: List of key (summary level) invoice details without line item details.

NextToken.description: The token to retrieve the next set of results. Amazon Web Services provides the token when the response from a previous call has more results than the maximum page size.

AccountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID.

IssuedDate.description: The issued date of the invoice.

Entity.description: The organization name providing Amazon Web Services services.

InvoicingEntity.description: The name of the entity that issues the Amazon Web Services invoice.

BillingPeriod.description: The billing period of the invoice-related document.

PurchaseOrderNumber.description: The purchase order number associated to the invoice.

BaseCurrencyAmount.description: The summary with the product and service currency.

TotalAmountBeforeTax.description: Details about the invoice total amount before tax.

CurrencyCode.description: The currency dominion of the invoice document.

AmountBreakdown.description: Details about the invoice currency amount.

SubTotalAmount.description: The total of a set of the breakdown.

TotalAmount.description: The total amount for your taxes.

TaxCurrencyAmount.description: The summary with the tax currency.

TotalAmountBeforeTax.description: Details about the invoice total amount before tax.

CurrencyCode.description: The currency dominion of the invoice document.

AmountBreakdown.description: Details about the invoice currency amount.

SubTotalAmount.description: The total of a set of the breakdown.

TotalAmount.description: The total amount for your taxes.

PaymentCurrencyAmount.description: The summary with the customer configured currency.

TotalAmountBeforeTax.description: Details about the invoice total amount before tax.

CurrencyCode.description: The currency dominion of the invoice document.

AmountBreakdown.description: Details about the invoice currency amount.

SubTotalAmount.description: The total of a set of the breakdown.

TotalAmount.description: The total amount for your taxes.

ResourceTags.description: Adds a tag to a resource.

Key.description: The object key of your of your resource tag.

Value.description: The specific value of the resource tag.

ProcurementPortalPreferenceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the updated procurement portal preference.

InvoiceUnitArn.description: The ARN to identify an invoice unit. This information can't be modified or deleted.

ProcurementPortalPreferenceArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the procurement portal preference with updated status.
